name: TENNANT CO
business: Tennant Company designs, manufactures and markets floor maintenance and cleaning equipment, including manual and autonomous mechanized cleaning equipment, detergent-free cleaning technologies, aftermarket parts and consumables, equipment maintenance and repair services, and asset management solutions. Its products are used in retail, distribution centers, factories, warehouses, public venues, offices, schools, hospitals, and more. Customers include contract cleaners and businesses that perform facilities maintenance themselves.
sellsTo: public venues such as arenas and stadiums
businesses that perform facilities maintenance themselves

exposures.sentence: a portfolio of differentiated technology solutions that includes an expanding portfolio of robotic cleaning equipment
ec-H2O NanoClean as a detergent-free cleaning solution
IRIS as an asset management solution
ReadySpace as a rapid-drying carpet cleaning technology

Global cybersecurity threats and incidents can range from uncoordinated individual attempts to gain unauthorized access to IT systems to sophisticated and targeted measures known as advanced persistent threats, directed at the Company, its products and its customers.
